verify.rule: All required features and interfaces are present.
Total mass of the subsystem must not exceed the allocated budget.
Each part_tree entry has corresponding geometry_ops.
Interfaces are reciprocal between subsystems.
Critical joints have visible locking or preload evidence.

risk.desc: Structural integrity under simulated thermal loads may be compromised if materials are not properly selected.
risk.mit: Conduct material selection and thermal analysis to ensure compatibility.

risk.desc: Incorrect assembly order may lead to misalignment or damage during integration.
risk.mit: Provide clear assembly instructions and conduct pre-assembly checks.

risk.desc: Insufficient strain relief for cables could result in failure during handling or vibration.
risk.mit: Implement strain relief features and ensure proper routing.

risk.desc: Misaligned interfaces could cause interference or improper fit during assembly.
risk.mit: Use precise alignment tools and conduct fit checks before final assembly.

risk.desc: Overestimation of mass could lead to weight issues in the overall vehicle design.
risk.mit: Regularly update mass estimates and adjust as necessary.

Access for viewing and sliding the display cartridge

Confirm the total mass of the subsystem does not exceed the allocated budget (cad_brief.mass_est_g)
